hooks.command: cd /Users/server_user/Documents/bot_podcasts && git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null && exit 0; git add workflows/ prompts/ scripts/ docker-compose.yml CLAUDE.md AGENT.md README.md docs/ 2>/dev/null; STAGED=$(git diff --staged --name-only 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$STAGED" ] && exit 0; if echo "$STAGED" | grep -qE '^workflows/'; then TYPE=feat; elif echo "$STAGED" | grep -qE '^(CLAUDE\.md|README\.md|AGENT\.md|docs/)'; then TYPE=docs; elif echo "$STAGED" | grep -qE '^scripts/'; then TYPE=chore; elif echo "$STAGED" | grep -qE '^docker-compose'; then TYPE=chore; else TYPE=chore; fi; SCOPE=$(echo "$STAGED" | sed 's|.*/||' | sed 's|\.[^.]*$||' | sort -u | head -3 | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//'); DESC=$(git diff --staged --stat | tail -1); git commit -m "${TYPE}(${SCOPE}): ${DESC}" && git push origin main 2>/dev/null || true
